zh.lifeSummary: 當Andrew Bures於1477年出生在英國素福爾可阿克頓時，他的父親William De Bures II51歲，母親Lady Joan Markham41歲。他於大約1496年與Alice Smythe在英國艾可結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1524年7月10日在英國英格蘭艾可格亞特 坎菲爾德享年47歲。

nameMeanings.name: Bures
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Czech and Slovak Milan, Jaroslav.
Czech and Slovak (Bureš): from a pet form of the old personal name Burian .
English (Essex): habitational name from Mount Bures (Essex) and adjacent Bures Saint Mary (Suffolk), both meaning ‘the cottages’, from Old English būr, plural būras.

variants.name: Burian
meanings: Czech and Slovak (also Burián); Hungarian (Burián); Polish and Romanian: from Burian, Burián, an old personal name apparently composed of bur ‘peasant’, a word of German origin (see Bauer and Bur ), and the name Jan (Slovak Ján) ‘John’. In Czech, the name Burian or Bur Jan denotes Saint John, a Christian martyr who lived in the 4th century in Rome and is venerated together with Saint Paul. Compare German Burhans and the name below.
North German: variant of   Burhans  , formed with the personal name   Jan   ‘John’ in place of its cognate   Hans  .

variants.name: Buresh
meanings: Americanized form of Czech and Slovak Bureš (see Bures ) and of their Germanized form Buresch (compare 2 below).

Americanized form of German (of Slavic origin) Buresch: from a short form of an Old Slavic personal name Burislav (composed of the elements bur, derived from buriti se ‘to stir up’ + slav, from slava ‘glory’). See also 1 above.

nameMeanings.name: Andrew
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the Greek name Andreas, a short form of any of various compound names derived from andr- ‘man, warrior’. In the New Testament this is the name of the first disciple to be called by Jesus. After the Resurrection, St Andrew preached in Asia Minor and Greece. He is traditionally believed to have been crucified at Patras in Achaia. He was one of the most popular saints of the Middle Ages and was adopted as the patron of Scotland, Russia, and Greece. It has long been among the most popular boys' names in the English-speaking world, especially in Scotland. Its popularity in England was further enhanced by its use as a British royal name for Prince Andrew ( b. 1960 ), the Duke of York.

en.lifeSummary: When Andrew Bures was born in 1477, in Acton, Suffolk, England, his father, William De Bures II, was 51 and his mother, Lady Joan Markham, was 41. He married Alice Smythe about 1496, in Essex, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 10 July 1524, in Great Canfield, Essex, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 47.

Il a épousé Alice Smythe environ 1496, à Essex, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 10 juillet 1524, à Great Canfield, Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 47 ans.

ko.Bures Saint Mary, Babergh, Suffolk, Engl: 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 버스 세인트 메리
ko.lifeSummary: Andrew Bures(이)가 1477년 영국 수폴크 악턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William De Bures II(은)는 51세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Joan Markham(은)는 41세였다. 그는 대략 1496년 영국 에세스에서 Alice Smythe(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1524년 7월 10일 영국 잉글랜드 에세스 그리트 캔필드에서 47세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Andrew Bures nasceu em 1477, em Acton, Suffolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, William De Bures II, tinha 51 anos e sua mãe, Lady Joan Markham, tinha 41 anos. Ele casou-se com Alice Smythe aproximadamente 1496, em Essex, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 10 de julho de 1524, em Great Canfield, Essex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 47 anos.

ru.Bures Saint Mary, Babergh, Suffolk, Engl: буресь сеинт мэри, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Andrew Bures родился в 1477 г. в местности актон, суффолк, Англия, его отцу по имени William De Bures II было 51 год, а матери, которую звали Lady Joan Markham, 41. Он женился на женщине по имени Alice Smythe около 1496 г. в местности эссекс, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер 10 июля 1524 г. в местности грит канфиелд, эссекс, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 47 лет.
